title: Healthy Child, Healthy Future: Health Review Statistics for Northern Ireland 2024/25
body: "This publication presents key statistical information relating to Health Reviews for pre-school children in Northern Ireland. The Healthy Child, Healthy Future framework for the Universal Child Health Promotion Programme within Northern Ireland sets out a schedule of child health reviews that every family can expect. The figures within this publication detail the number of reviews completed, and the timing of these reviews. "
